mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device WHERE 1=1
AND ( id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{match}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{match}, '%') OR ip LIKE CONCAT('%', #{match}, '%') OR deviceType LIKE CONCAT('%', #{match}, '%') OR temperature LIKE CONCAT('%', #{match}, '%') OR humidity LIKE CONCAT('%', #{match}, '%') OR lightIntensity LIKE CONCAT('%', #{match}, '%') )
